title: fix(command): ignore `--format` in `podman search --list-tags`
body:
Fix: https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/19033

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
Fix ignore `--format` in `podman search --list-tags`
```

/cc @vrothberg
